entity.summary: On-chain order-book exchange and trading infrastructure in the Injective ecosystem, supporting spot and perpetual markets, automated liquidity vaults, APIs, and exchange-building integrations.
entity.notes: HEI models the Helix and Helix Spot discovery rows as one exchange entity. Current first-party documentation describes an on-chain order book used for perpetual and spot markets, automated liquidity vaults, APIs, trading bots, and DEX-building infrastructure.

evidence.title: About Helix
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Helix's on-chain order-book exchange infrastructure, spot and perpetual markets, automated liquidity vaults, APIs, bots, and DEX-building functionality.

evidence.title: Helix official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application remains available and identifies Helix as a decentralized spot and derivatives exchange.

evidence.title: Helix exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates Helix identity; the separate Helix Spot source row is consolidated into the same entity.
